ALL.title: No integrations
ALL.description: Create your first integration to start syncing data.

ACTIVE.title: No active integrations
ACTIVE.description: Activate an integration or create a new one.

INACTIVE.title: No inactive integrations
INACTIVE.description: All integrations are active or in another state.

PENDING.title: No pending integrations
PENDING.description: There are no integrations in pending state.

errors.loadDescription: Something went wrong while loading integrations. Please try again.

deleteModal.title: Delete integration
deleteModal.message: Delete integration "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

toasts.genericError: The operation could not be completed
toasts.deleteErrorDescription: The integration could not be deleted.
toasts.toggleErrorDescription: The integration status could not be changed.

welcome.title: Welcome to Integrations
welcome.description: Connect CheckIO with external systems (HR, payroll, etc.). This guide shows the main features.

toolbar.title: New integration
toolbar.description: Create integrations with external systems. The button appears if you have permission.

tabs.title: Status filter
tabs.description: Use the tabs to see all integrations or filter by active, inactive, pending, or error state.

cards.title: Integration cards
cards.description: Each card shows status, actions (test connection, edit, activate/deactivate), and sync dates.

empty.title: No results
empty.description: When the current filter has no items, you will see a message here.
